overview: An ultra-premium investor landing page for Petverz, a pet identity + wallet + service ecosystem startup. Apple-level design with dark theme, neon blue accents, and smooth scroll storytelling across 11 narrative sections — from hero to investor CTA.
features: Hero section with animated QR card mockup and glow effect
Problem → insight → solution narrative flow with SVG diagrams
Product demo with mobile UI mockups and 4-step flow
Market opportunity and business model sections with clean charts
Why Petverz Wins with layered architecture diagram
Phase roadmap timeline with neon connectors
Dark theme (#0B0F1A) with neon blue (#00C6FF) accents throughout
Smooth scroll animations and section fade-in effects
